label: Precalculus
shortDescription: Advanced functions, trigonometry, complex numbers, and preparation for calculus.
modulesDescription: Read the precalculus lessons in order, or jump directly to the topic you need.
ogDescription: Free precalculus course covering functions, polynomials, exponentials, trigonometry, systems, complex numbers, and conics with detailed explanations and practice.
courseDescription: Master precalculus: functions and graphs, polynomial and rational functions, exponential and logarithmic functions, trigonometric functions, analytic trigonometry, systems and matrices, complex numbers and polar coordinates, sequences series and conics. Features ELI5 intuition, worked examples with steps and tables, common pitfalls, and high-quality practice questions.

topics.title: Function (mathematics)
topics.description: A rule that assigns to every input in the domain exactly one output.

topics.title: Domain of a function
topics.description: The set of all input values for which the function produces a defined output.

topics.title: Range (mathematics)
topics.description: The set of all possible output values a function can produce as inputs vary over the domain.

topics.title: Even and odd functions
topics.description: Functions with symmetry: even are y-axis symmetric, odd are origin symmetric.

topics.title: Inverse function
topics.description: The function that undoes another, existing only when the original is one-to-one.

topics.title: Composition of functions
topics.description: Applying one function to the result of another: (f ∘ g)(x) = f(g(x)).

topics.title: Transformation of functions
topics.description: Shifting, stretching, and reflecting graphs of functions using parameters inside and outside the function.

topics.title: Piecewise function
topics.description: A function defined by different formulas on different parts of its domain, using brace notation.

topics.title: Polynomial
topics.description: An expression of powers with coefficients; degree determines end behavior and number of roots.

topics.title: Root of a function
topics.description: A value r where f(r)=0; for polynomials, x-intercepts and linear factors by FTA.

topics.title: Rational function
topics.description: Quotient of two polynomials; introduces asymptotes, holes, and interesting end behavior.

topics.title: Asymptote
topics.description: Lines the graph approaches but may not reach: vertical, horizontal, oblique for rationals and others.

topics.title: Partial fraction decomposition
topics.description: Rewriting a rational function as sum of simpler fractions for integration and solving.

topics.title: Exponential function
topics.description: Functions of form a * b^x ; model growth, decay, with properties from exponent rules.

topics.title: Logarithm
topics.description: The inverse of exponential: log_b a is the exponent to which b must be raised to get a.

topics.title: Natural logarithm
topics.description: Log base e; inverse of exp, special in calculus because derivative of e^x and ln x are themselves and reciprocal.

topics.title: Logarithmic scale
topics.description: Scales where equal distances represent multiplicative ratios (Richter, dB, pH, stellar magnitude).

topics.title: Exponential growth
topics.description: Growth at rate proportional to current size: P(t) = P0 e^{kt}; doubling time, continuous compounding, half-life.

topics.title: Trigonometric functions
topics.description: Sine, cosine, tangent and reciprocals defined via right triangle or unit circle; periodic functions.

topics.title: Sine
topics.description: The y-coordinate on the unit circle; odd, periodic function with range [-1,1], period 2π.

topics.title: Cosine
topics.description: The x-coordinate on the unit circle; even, periodic with range [-1,1], period 2π.

topics.title: Tangent
topics.description: sin/cos; period π, range all reals, vertical asymptotes at odd multiples of π/2.

topics.title: Unit circle
topics.description: Circle of radius 1; (cos θ, sin θ) gives exact trig values for standard angles in radians and degrees.

topics.title: Trigonometric identity
topics.description: Always-true equations like Pythagorean sin²+cos²=1 used to simplify and prove.

topics.title: Double-angle formula
topics.description: Formulas for sin2θ, cos2θ, tan2θ in terms of single angle; derived from addition.

topics.title: Half-angle formula
topics.description: Formulas for sin(θ/2), cos(θ/2), tan(θ/2) with ± chosen by quadrant of half angle.

topics.title: Sum-to-product identity
topics.description: Formulas turning sinA ± sinB into product of sin/cos of (A±B)/2 ; useful for solving and simplifying.

topics.title: Law of sines
topics.description: In any triangle a/sinA = b/sinB = c/sinC = 2R ; solves AAS, ASA, SSA (ambiguous case).

topics.title: Law of cosines
topics.description: c² = a² + b² - 2ab cos C (generalizes Pythagoras); solves SAS and SSS.

topics.title: Trigonometric substitution
topics.description: Technique x = a sinθ , a tanθ or a secθ to simplify integrals with √(a² ± x²) forms (preview for calculus).

topics.title: Inverse trigonometric functions
topics.description: arcsin, arccos, arctan recover angle from ratio; restricted ranges to be one-to-one functions.

topics.title: Trigonometric equation
topics.description: Solving sin x = k etc using inverse + general solution with + period; check extraneous.

topics.title: Sum and difference formula
topics.description: sin(A±B), cos(A±B), tan(A±B) formulas; used for exact values like 15°=45-30 and proving identities.

topics.title: System of linear equations
topics.description: Set of linear eqs solved simultaneously; can have 0,1, or infinitely many solutions.

topics.title: Matrix (mathematics)
topics.description: Rectangular array of numbers; used to represent systems, transformations, data.

topics.title: Determinant
topics.description: Scalar from square matrix encoding volume scaling, orientation, and invertibility (det≠0).

topics.title: Inverse matrix
topics.description: A^{-1} such that A A^{-1} = I ; exists iff det ≠0; undoes the linear transformation.

topics.title: Matrix multiplication
topics.description: AB defined when cols A = rows B; (i,j) entry is dot of row i of A with col j of B; not commutative.

topics.title: Gaussian elimination
topics.description: Row reduction of augmented matrix to echelon form to solve linear systems systematically.

topics.title: Complex number
topics.description: a + bi with i²=-1; arithmetic, conjugate, modulus, form a field.

topics.title: Complex plane
topics.description: Argand diagram: plot a+bi as (a,b); modulus distance, arg angle.

topics.title: Polar form of complex numbers
topics.description: z = r (cos θ + i sin θ); multiplication and powers become simple on r and θ.

topics.title: De Moivre's theorem
topics.description: [r (cos θ + i sin θ)]^n = r^n (cos nθ + i sin nθ); powers and roots of complex easy.

topics.title: Polar coordinates
topics.description: (r, θ) instead of (x,y); x=r cosθ , y = r sinθ ; useful for circles, roses, cardioids.

topics.title: Parametric equation
topics.description: x=f(t), y=g(t); describes curves with direction and timing; can trace non-functions like circles.

topics.title: Sequence
topics.description: Ordered list a1, a2, ... (function on positive integers); may converge or diverge.

topics.title: Arithmetic progression
topics.description: Constant difference d: a_n = a1 + (n-1)d ; sum formulas S_n = n/2 (first + last) or equiv.

topics.title: Geometric progression
topics.description: Constant ratio r: a_n = a1 * r^{n-1} ; finite sum a1 (r^n-1)/(r-1); infinite |r|<1 converges to a1/(1-r).

topics.title: Binomial theorem
topics.description: (x + y)^n = sum C(n,k) x^{n-k} y^k ; C(n,k)= n! / (k! (n-k)!); Pascal's triangle.

topics.title: Conic section
topics.description: Circle, ellipse, parabola, hyperbola as cone slices or quadratic loci; standard forms after translation.

topics.title: Limit (mathematics)
topics.description: lim x→a f(x) = L : f(x) can be made arbitrarily close to L by making x close to a; foundation of calculus.
